title: Is that really Jim Carrey? Actor breaks silence after hyper-realistic makeup artist mask post goes viral
summary_full: After Jim Carrey accepted an honorary award at the César Awards in Paris, online speculation over his altered appearance spiralled into clone theories, body-double claims and AI misinformation. Drag artist Alexis Stone further fuelled debate with a hyper-realistic mask post, while a fabricated AI video falsely attributed to Carrey’s daughter deepened the viral storm.
